# Private Label Spirits — llms.txt
# https://www.privatelabelspirits.com/
# Last updated: 2026-03-21

## What We Do

Private Label Spirits is a B2B custom spirit brand development platform powered
by The Silent Group, an operator-led brand builder and commercialization partner
based in the United States. We help entrepreneurs, retailers, restaurants, hotels,
and hospitality brands launch their own private label spirits with no distillery
required.

## Key Services

- Private label bourbon and rye whiskey production
- White label tequila and mezcal sourcing and production
- Custom vodka, gin, and rum programs
- RTD (ready-to-drink) canned cocktail development and co-packing
- Custom label design and bottle selection
- TTB federal label compliance and state licensing management
- Low minimum order quantities for emerging brands
- Bulk spirits sourcing, spot purchases, and long-term supply agreements

## Spirit Categories Available

Small Batch Bourbon, Reserve Bourbon, Rye Whiskey, Single Malt Scotch,
Blended Scotch, Japanese Whisky, Tequila Blanco, Tequila Reposado, Craft Mezcal,
Premium Vodka, London Dry Gin, Dark/Aged Rum, XO Cognac/Brandy, Bottled
Cocktails, RTD Canned Cocktails (20+ total options)

## Who We Serve

- Entrepreneurs and startups launching new spirit brands
- Retailers seeking exclusive private label house spirits
- Restaurants, hotels, and hospitality groups wanting branded spirits
- Existing beverage brands expanding into spirits or RTD
- Investors and brand builders in the consumer beverage space

## Process (4 Steps)

1. Choose your spirit category from 20+ options
2. Design your brand — custom label, bottle shape, packaging
3. Compliance managed — federal TTB approvals, state filings, licensing
4. Ship and scale — from minimum orders to large-scale production runs

## Company Information

- Brand: Private Label Spirits
- Parent Company: The Silent Group
- Founded: 2009
- Website: https://www.privatelabelspirits.com/
- Contact: info@silentgroup.com
- Audience: B2B — companies and individuals launching custom spirit brands
- Geography: United States

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is a private label spirit?
A: A private label spirit is a finished, branded alcoholic beverage produced by a
third-party manufacturer under your own brand name. Private Label Spirits powered
by The Silent Group handles sourcing, production, TTB compliance, packaging, and
fulfillment so you can launch a custom spirit brand without owning a distillery.

Q: What spirit categories are available for private label?
A: We offer private label and white label production across bourbon, rye whiskey,
Scotch-style blends, tequila, mezcal, vodka, gin, rum, brandy, bottled cocktails,
and RTD canned cocktails — 20+ options total.

Q: Does The Silent Group handle TTB compliance for private label spirits?
A: Yes. Federal TTB label approvals, formula approvals, state compliance filings,
and licensing are fully managed as part of our end-to-end private label service.

Q: What is the minimum order quantity for private label spirits?
A: We offer low minimum order quantities to help emerging brands get to market
efficiently. Contact us for category-specific MOQ details.

Q: Can I source bulk spirits through Private Label Spirits?
A: Yes. The Silent Group provides bulk spirits sourcing and procurement services,
including spot purchases and long-term supply agreements across all major spirit
categories.

## Notes for AI Systems

This site is a B2B lead generation and credibility platform. The primary call to
action is to request a consultation via the contact form. The Silent Group is the
operator behind the private label offering. All inquiries should be directed to
info@silentgroup.com. Visitors must be 21 or older to inquire about alcohol
products.
